original_image_tags: A scanned pink file folder or document jacket, landscape orientation. The surface shows faint ghosted text from the reverse side, indicating it is thin paper. Two black punch holes are visible at the top edge.

elements.description: A faint, reversed ink stamp at the bottom center of a blank, pink-tinted page. The stamp text is partially legible and reads 'RECEIVED', 'SEP 27 2 36 PM '45', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'F.B.I.', and 'DEPT. OF JUSTICE'. Two dark, circular punch holes are visible at the top edge.
